title: epilobium angustifolium var. abbreviatum
intro: Epilobium angustifolium var. abbreviatum, also known as the short-fruited willowherb, is a variety of the willowherb plant native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Epilobium angustifolium var. abbreviatum include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat urinary tract infections and other health conditions.
